$meta.name: Rogue Films v2 design tokens
$meta.source: Figma file BuVndAwQ1zQKACDJFswneK — Rogue Website 2026 updates
$meta.notes: Figma file contains no native Variables or Styles — every value is inline. This token set is greenfield, inferred from observed usage across 7 desktop frames (canvas 0:1, 1728px) and 7 mobile frames (canvas 162:3727, 402px). Mobile values are Figma-sourced. Tablet values are proposed — no tablet canvas exists, so tablet values are linearly interpolated between mobile and desktop, rounded to clean numbers. Semantic tokens are resolved to static values here because the Token Bridge plugin does not support aliasing on JSON import; aliasing is preserved in Webflow via existing_variable_id.

tokens.description: Brand navy. Primary page background on all non-Talent pages.
Brand accent pink. Active states, highlights, logo, headline block.
Brand cream. Primary text colour on dark surfaces.
Used as Talent-list surface base and for text on pink surface.
Reserved. Only one Figma use (film-poster placeholder caption) — treat as outlier.
Muted text. Used on footer copyright line.
Divider. Used as horizontal rule under Contact page hero.
Default page background. Resolves to raw/navy.
Talent-list page base surface. Resolves to raw/black.
Pink statement block on homepage. Resolves to raw/pink.
Default body and heading text on dark background. Resolves to raw/cream.
Highlighted text, active nav, active filter pill label. Resolves to raw/pink.
Text placed on pink surface (homepage hero statement). Resolves to raw/black.
De-emphasised footnote/copyright. Resolves to raw/grey-500.
Logo, brand accent visuals. Resolves to raw/pink. (Kept for compatibility with seeded collection.)
Default link colour. Resolves to raw/pink.
Link hover colour. Resolves to raw/cream.
Active/selected state for filter pills and nav. Resolves to raw/pink.
Pill/filter/search borders on navy surfaces. Cream at 30% alpha.
Horizontal divider (e.g. Contact hero). Resolves to raw/grey-800.
Display typeface. Used only for 120px page H1s. Commercial font — licensing check required.
Body typeface. Nav, headings, body copy, labels. Commercial font — licensing check required.
Large page H1s (Talent, Joe Connor, Music Video, Film & TV, We are rogue). Mobile and Desktop are Figma-sourced; Tablet is interpolated (midpoint).
Homepage pink statement block, News section heading. Mobile and Desktop Figma-sourced; Tablet interpolated.
Section heading (e.g. Contact 'Offices'). Mobile and Desktop Figma-sourced; Tablet interpolated.
Subsection heading (e.g. Contact city labels like 'London'). Mobile and Desktop Figma-sourced; Tablet interpolated.
Sub-subsection / lead paragraph (e.g. Contact intro). Mobile and Desktop Figma-sourced; Tablet interpolated.
Stable name/label role. Talent-list director names, Contact lead paragraph. 20px across all breakpoints per Figma.
Film thumbnail titles within grid overlays. Mobile 16px, Desktop 20px per Figma (equals `title` at desktop). Tablet interpolated.
Default body copy, nav links, filter pill labels, thumbnail director names, footer lines. Mobile 14px, Desktop 16px per Figma. Tablet interpolated.
Footer copyright, thumbnail director-name caption, news-grid titles. Mobile 12px, Desktop 14px per Figma. Tablet interpolated.
Regular weight. Used across Px Grotesk body text.
Bold weight. Used on Px Grotesk thumbnail titles.
ExtraBold. Only Galano Grotesque display usage.
Display sizes, page H1s, name-style lists. Unitless multiplier.
Standard body copy and reading contexts. Unitless multiplier.
Pill labels, nav links, footer address blocks. Unitless multiplier.
Default tracking. No Figma data suggests deviation; reserved slot for future variants.
Filter-pill gap, thumbnail title-to-director gap.
Homepage news section internal gap. Breaks 8-pt grid — preserved for Figma fidelity.
News thumbnail-to-caption gap. Breaks 8-pt grid — preserved for Figma fidelity.
Pill padding, footer social gap, nav vertical padding.
Film thumbnail internal padding, film-detail section gap.
Homepage news inter-block gap, Talent list per-column row gap.
Footer outer gap, Contact office address block internal gap.
Page horizontal padding across all pages, filter section gap.
Film-detail horizontal padding, Contact horizontal padding, homepage news bottom padding.
Contact offices section horizontal gap, pink hero statement block padding.
Effectively fully rounded. All pill-shaped elements (filter pills, search input, back button, copy-link button, genre dropdown). Only radius used across the Figma.
Standard mobile threshold. Proposed — no Figma mobile frames exist.
Standard tablet threshold. Proposed — no Figma tablet frames exist.
Webflow default desktop start.
Webflow default large-desktop start.
The only width Figma defines. Fluid scaling upper bound.
Quick micro-interactions (hover/focus states). Value in milliseconds. Proposed — Figma provides no motion data.
Default transition (e.g. talent-page video crossfade). Value in milliseconds. Proposed.
Slow/dramatic transitions. Value in milliseconds. Proposed.
Standard ease (Material-style). Proposed.
Ease-in for elements leaving view. Proposed.
Ease-out for elements entering view. Proposed.
